ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier (UUID) for the object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., Folder, Item, Dataset, Domain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the object (e.g., public, private) */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object ID of the folder */,
  "parent_folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent folder (if any) */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the folder in the hierarchy */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the folder */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the folder */,
  "quota" REAL /* Quota for the folder */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Last synchronization date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_parent_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object ID of the item */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder containing the item */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the item */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the item in MB */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the item */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the item */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object ID of the dataset */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder containing the dataset (if any) */,
  "feature_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature dataset containing the dataset (if any) */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the dataset data file */,
  "data_file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset data file in MB */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., image, text) */,
  "data_schema" TEXT /* Schema of the dataset data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_feature_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_dataset_id") REFERENCES feature_datasets ("feature_dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object ID of the domain */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset containing the domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the domain */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the domain */,
  "domain_type" TEXT /* Type of the domain (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child object in the relationship */,
  "parent_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent object in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., Parent Folder Of, Contains Item, Contains Dataset) */,
  "is_containment" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the relationship is a containment relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_parent_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "disabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is disabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "remote_ip" TEXT /* Remote IP address of the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the permission applies to */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has read access */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has write access */,
  "delete_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has delete access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object with the version history */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the object */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_datasets" (
  "feature_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature dataset */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object ID of the feature dataset */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder containing the feature dataset */,
  "feature_dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the feature dataset */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the feature dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_datasets_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_datasets_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the metadata applies to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the report applies to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., usage, trends) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)
